bug_fix.title: Solve breaking issue with CharTokenizer
bug_fix.rationale: The PR fixes a TypeError in CharTokenizer by adding a missing `_string = None` attribute to prevent abstract class instantiation issues, with accompanying test coverage.

refactor_cleanup.title: Move all pytest code to nltk/test/
refactor_cleanup.rationale: This PR consolidates pytest configuration and setup code from scattered production modules into a centralized test directory structure, removing duplicate setup_module functions and improving code organization without adding features or fixing bugs.

build_ci_deps.title: First try at travis
build_ci_deps.rationale: PR adds .travis.yml configuration file and modifies build scripts (jenkins.sh), establishing continuous integration infrastructure for the project as indicated by CI label and title mentioning Travis.

data_corpus_update.title: framenet.doctest: Apparently corpus ID changed from FN 1.5 to 1.7
data_corpus_update.rationale: PR updates framenet doctest expectations to reflect a corpus version change from FrameNet 1.5 to 1.7.

feature_addition.title: Language Modeling
feature_addition.rationale: This PR adds a new language modeling module to NLTK with comprehensive API, data structures, models, preprocessing, and smoothing implementations, along with extensive tests and documentation.

deprecation_removal.title: Remove more Python 2 artifacts
deprecation_removal.rationale: PR removes Python 2 compatibility code and functions from compat.py that are no longer needed since Python 2 is deprecated, including the removal of unicode_repr() and other legacy compatibility exports.

documentation.title: Typofix
documentation.rationale: This PR fixes typos in comments and docstrings across 34 files, which constitutes a documentation improvement rather than functional code changes.

copyright_metadata_update.title: Updated Copyright year to 2023
copyright_metadata_update.rationale: This PR only updates copyright year metadata across files without changing code logic, functionality, or structure.

security_fix.title: fix(security): stop quadratic ReDoS in CCG lexicon parsing (CWE-1333)
security_fix.rationale: This PR fixes a ReDoS (Regular Expression Denial of Service) vulnerability (CWE-1333) in CCG lexicon parsing by eliminating quadratic regex backtracking, with additional security-focused tests.

test_coverage.title: add tests for _make_bound_method
test_coverage.rationale: PR explicitly adds a new test file with test coverage for _make_bound_method to ensure compatibility across Python versions before addressing py3.13 specific changes.

revert.title: Backtracking some python 2.5 incompatible changes
revert.rationale: This PR explicitly backtracks and withdraws previous changes that introduced Python 2.5 incompatibilities, reverting the use of @setter decorators and collections.MutableSequence.

style_lint_formatting.title: Extra whitespaces are removed, all tabs are converted to spaces
style_lint_formatting.rationale: PR removes extra whitespaces and converts all tabs to spaces across 162 files with nearly balanced additions/deletions, indicating pure formatting cleanup with no functional changes.
